title: algorithm-selection-notes
notes: Valid MOO string-literal comments summarizing algorithm selection guidance for training data.

title: algorithm-dispatcher-filter-candidates

args: LIST candidates, MIXED requester, MIXED destination, ?INT limit
notes: Shows candidate filtering with skips for self, same location, busy state, missing path, and optional result limit.

title: algorithm-dispatcher-prune-expired-gates
provenance: Adapted from $dispatcher:_auto_prune with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); property mutation and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows pruning expired temporary gate rows by timestamp.

title: algorithm-dispatcher-select-shortest-paths
provenance: Adapted from $dispatcher:dispatch_allies with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); action side effects, broadcasts, short refs, and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows repeatedly selecting the available candidate with the shortest path.

title: algorithm-dispatcher-temporary-gate
provenance: Adapted from $dispatcher:passes_faction_aide_gate and $dispatcher:add_faction_aide_gate with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); faction/location policy and VMS metadata removed.
args: LIST gates, MIXED group, MIXED location, STR mode, ?INT ttl
notes: Shows temporary duplicate-suppression gates keyed by location and group.

title: algorithm-list-bounded-recursive-reverse
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:_reverse with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows recursive divide-and-conquer for large lists and insertion at the front for small lists.

title: algorithm-list-compress-runs
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:compress with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows removing only consecutive duplicate runs while preserving later repeated values.

title: algorithm-list-extreme-by-length
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:longest and $list_utils:shortest with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows selecting an extreme element by computed length with input validation.

title: algorithm-list-insertion-sort-permutation
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:sort with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows sorting keys while applying the same permutation to a value list.

title: algorithm-list-merge-sort-alist
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:sort_alist with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed and merge loop simplified.
notes: Shows recursive merge sort over alist rows by a selected column.

title: algorithm-list-queue-ops
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:unshift and $list_utils:shift with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows queue-style front insertion and front removal with ordinary lists.

title: algorithm-list-quicksort-property
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:sort_by_property with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); cache/datastore code and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows quicksort partitioning over object property values.

title: algorithm-list-recursive-flatten
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:flatten with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); historical note and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows recursive traversal of arbitrarily nested lists.

title: algorithm-list-stack-ops
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:push and $list_utils:pop with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows stack push/pop behavior represented with plain MOO lists.

title: algorithm-list-suspended-flatten
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:flatten_suspended with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows recursive list flattening with periodic yielding.

title: algorithm-list-suspended-insertion-sort
provenance: Adapted from $list_utils:sort_suspended with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows an insertion-sort permutation that yields during long input scans.

title: algorithm-math-base-conversion
provenance: Adapted from $math_utils:base_conversion with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); object property dependency and VMS metadata removed.
args: MIXED value, INT source_base, INT target_base
notes: Shows conversion through an integer accumulator and repeated remainder extraction.

title: algorithm-math-factorial-iterative
provenance: Adapted from $math_utils:factorial with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows iterative multiplication with input validation.

title: algorithm-math-fibonacci-sequence
provenance: Adapted from $math_utils:fibonacci with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); argument-order issue corrected and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows iterative sequence generation using the last two list elements.

title: algorithm-math-gcd-euclidean
provenance: Adapted from $math_utils:gcd with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); ToastStunt min/max builtins, assignment-in-condition, and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows the Euclidean algorithm with explicit loop-state updates.

title: algorithm-object-branches-splice-frontier
provenance: Adapted from $object_utils:branches with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed and assignment-in-condition avoided.
notes: Shows keeping internal nodes while removing leaves from a traversal frontier.

title: algorithm-object-descendants-breadth-first
provenance: Adapted from the MOO-code branch of $object_utils:descendants with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); ToastStunt builtin shortcut and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows breadth-first descendant traversal using children() instead of the ToastStunt descendants() builtin.

title: algorithm-object-descendants-with-property
provenance: Adapted from $object_utils:descendants_with_property_suspended with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); permission policy and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows recursive descendant filtering by direct property definition with yielding.

title: algorithm-object-leaves-splice-frontier
provenance: Adapted from $object_utils:leaves with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); VMS metadata removed and assignment-in-condition avoided.
notes: Shows replacing an internal node with its children until only leaves remain.

title: algorithm-scheduler-duplicate-guard
provenance: Adapted from $scheduler:schedule_every with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); scheduler start/stop policy and VMS metadata removed.
args: LIST tasks, LIST incoming_tasks, LIST task, ?INT processing, ?INT allow_duplicates
notes: Shows rejecting duplicate scheduled object/verb pairs and appending to the correct queue while processing.

title: algorithm-scheduler-next-runtime
provenance: Adapted from $scheduler:next_runtime with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs, raw object example text, and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows calculating next runtime for fixed, daily-time, ranged-random, and callback repeat specs.

title: algorithm-scheduler-remove-from-queues
provenance: Adapted from $scheduler:remove_scheduled with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); permission policy and VMS metadata removed.
args: LIST tasks, LIST incoming_tasks, OBJ object, ?STR verb_name, ?LIST optional_args
notes: Shows removing matching scheduled entries from both active and incoming queues.

title: algorithm-scheduler-repeat-spec-validation
provenance: Adapted from $scheduler:check_repeat_args with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); short refs and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows validating multiple repeat-spec shapes before accepting scheduled work.

title: algorithm-spatial-breadth-first-frontier
args: LIST graph, MIXED start, MIXED destination
notes: Shows breadth-first search with a FIFO frontier; included as contrast with recursive find_if_near-style DFS.

title: algorithm-spatial-depth-first-near-path
provenance: Adapted from $dynamic_room:find_if_near and $elevator:find_if_near with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); room-specific checks, cache hooks, short refs, and VMS metadata removed.
args: LIST graph, MIXED current, MIXED destination, ?LIST current_path, ?LIST exhausted, ?LIST shortest_path, ?INT depth
notes: Shows recursive depth-first path search with exhausted-node tracking, depth limit, and shortest-path replacement.

title: algorithm-spatial-depth-first-waypoint-pruning
provenance: Adapted from $room:best_waypoint_path with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); room-specific waypoint objects, short refs, and VMS metadata removed.
args: LIST waypoint_graph, MIXED current, MIXED destination, ?LIST current_path, ?LIST exhausted, ?LIST shortest_path
notes: Shows depth-first waypoint search with branch pruning when the current stack is already worse than the best known path.

title: algorithm-spatial-neighbor-coordinate-scan
provenance: Adapted from $spatial:return_spatical_neighbors with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); matrix object lookup, short refs, raw object defaults, and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows scanning coordinate offsets around a point and skipping the origin.

title: algorithm-spatial-remove-opposite-steps
provenance: Adapted from $spatial:remove_path_redundancies with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); alerts and VMS metadata removed.
notes: Shows reducing a path by repeatedly removing adjacent opposite-direction pairs.

title: algorithm-spatial-validate-cached-path
provenance: Adapted from $spatial:validate_cached_path with permission from Sindome (www.sindome.org); player/access checks, short refs, and VMS metadata removed.

notes: Shows map argument validation with optional datatype and ancestor checks.
